pages.title: Herbalist
pages.text: The entire Nirvana catalogue. Fifty-seven items. Class-gate only — mod-original recipes preserved where the mod provides one.$(br2)No other herb mod in the pack; Herbalist is the only botanic identity.

pages.title: Hemp and burlap
pages.text: $(bold)Hemp.$(/) The base crop, plus Hemp Seeds, Wild Hemp, Potted Wild Hemp.$(br2)$(bold)Cloth.$(/) Hemp Cloth, Hemp Burlap, Woven Burlap, Hemp Crate, Weed Crate.$(br2)16 colored hemp burlap and 16 colored woven burlap variants.

pages.title: Smoking gear
pages.text: Joint, Bong, Potion Bong.$(br2)Old Pipe, Stuffed Pipe, Suspicious Pipe.$(br2)Weed, Weed Brownie, THC, THC Minecart, Bliss Bloom, Herbal Salve.

pages.title: Cosmetic and curio
pages.text: Deerstalker hat, Peace Banner Pattern, Reefer Head, Reefer Spawn Egg.$(br2)Matching trader: the Herbalist.
